zh.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson於1333年5月23日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。她與Robert Morton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年11月30日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson于1333年5月23日出生在英国英格兰越可爾約克。她与Robert Morton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年11月30日在英国英格兰越可爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalyson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: patronymic or metronymic meaning ‘son of the dairyman or dairywoman’ (from Middle English day(e), dey(e) + son).
variant of Dawson with the original diphthong /au/ simplified to /a:/ in late Middle English and subsequently pronounced /εɪ/. Compare Dakin for Dawkin (see Dawkins ).

variants.name: Dawson
meanings: English: patronymic meaning ‘son of Dawe’, from the Middle English personal name Daw(e) (see Daw 1 and 2), which is sometimes a pet form of David (see 2 below) but more generally of Rauf or Raw (i.e. Ralph ), of which Daw(e) is a rhyming form. Alternatively, the patronymic could mean ‘son of Daud(e)’, another Middle English pet form of Ralph evidently used interchangeably with Dawe. Dawson is one of the most numerous patronymics.
Scottish: patronymic, ‘son of Dawe’. In Scotland Dawe is a diminutive of David (compare 1 above).

variants.name: Deason
meanings: English: variant of   Dayson   in either sense.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Norwegian Disen (see Dyson 2).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson was born on 23 May 1333, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert Morton. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 November 1387, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson est née le 23 mai 1333, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Robert Morton. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1387, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson wurde am 23. Mai 1333 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat Robert Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. November 1387 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson è nata il il 23 maggio 1333 nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Robert Morton. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1387, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalysonは1333年5月23日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた。Robert Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年11月30日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson(은)는 1333년 5월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 11월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella Dalyson родилась 23 мая 1333 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Morton. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 ноября 1387 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
